description: Segments for robotstoevsugere roundups. match uses price_dkk from the hot-products pool (the only spec-like signal there). Spec-based segments (til kaeledyr, med moppe) need enriched product specs that are not in the pool yet - add them under match.spec once product enrichment lands (Phase 2), no planner code change needed. segment_key is the stable id used in the slot_key (so two segments never collide); segment_phrase is the natural-Danish fragment used in the keyword/title.
